topic_title: Donald Trump rejects Iran's response to US peace proposal as unacceptable
topic_summary: Donald Trump has dismissed Iran's counter-terms for ending the regional conflict, leading to a sharp rise in global oil prices and volatility in international stock markets. Iranian officials have warned of new attacks while describing US demands as unreasonable, as coverage across Western and Middle Eastern media highlights the breakdown in negotiations.

findings.title: Iran describes its proposal to end war with US as 'legitimate' and 'generous'
findings.summary:
Iran describes its proposal to end war with US as 'legitimate' and 'generous'

    
    

        
    
                Iranian foreign ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei has said that Iran's proposal to end the war with the US and reopen the Strait of Hormuz is "legitimate" and "generous".

“Demanding an end to the war, lifting the blockade and piracy, and ⁠releasing Iranian assets that have ⁠been unjustly frozen in banks due to US pressure,” Esmaeil Baghaei ⁠said.

findings.title: Morning update
findings.summary:
Morning update

    
    

        
    
                Good morning Middle East Eye readers,

Hopes for a diplomatic breakthrough between Washington and Tehran have dimmed after Donald Trump dismissed Iran’s latest response to the US peace proposal as “totally unacceptable”.

Tehran insists the American plan amounted to surrender and is demanding guarantees against future attacks, while tensions continue to spill across the region.

Israeli strikes in Lebanon are intensifying, oil prices ar...

findings.title: Iran demands sovereignty over Hormuz in counterproposal to US
findings.summary:
Iran demands sovereignty over Hormuz in counterproposal to US

    
    

        
    
                Iran, in its counterproposal to end the conflict with the United States and Israel, is demanding full compensation for war damage, the lifting of all sanctions and recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz, according to reports by Iranian state media.

Press TV and IRIB said the proposal also called for the release of frozen Iranian assets and was delivered to W...

findings.summary:
The US-Israel war against Iran has now entered its 10th week and there has been little progress on the stalled peace talks.
These are the major takeaways from what happened overnight.

findings.title: Trump calls Iran’s response to US peace proposal ‘unacceptable’
findings.summary:
Iran sent its response to the latest US proposal to end the Iran war via Pakistani mediators on Sunday, but US President Donald Trump quickly rejected it in a social media post as “TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE!” – the latest setback to efforts to resolve the stand-off in the Persian Gulf that has throttled shipping and sent energy prices soaring.
Iranian state television reported that Tehran rejected the US proposal as amounting to surrender, insisting instead on “war reparations by the US, full Iran...

Iranian state television reported that Tehran rejected the US proposal as amounting to surrender, insisting instead on “war reparations by the US, full Iran...

findings.title: Irã envia resposta à proposta de paz dos EUA
findings.summary:
O Irã afirmou, neste domingo (10), que enviou resposta a uma proposta dos Estados Unidos para iniciar negociações de paz para acabar com a guerra. As informações são da agência Reuters com base na mídia estatal iraniana.

A resposta se concentrou no fim da guerra em todas as frentes, especialmente no Líbano, e na segurança da navegação pelo Estreito de Ormuz, sem indicar como ou quando poderia ser reaberto.

Notícias relacionadas:EUA e Irã estão perto de fechar memorando para pôr fim à guerra...

findings.title: Iran says made 'legitimate' demands in peace proposal rejected by Trump as 'totally unacceptable'
findings.summary:
Iran on Monday asserted that it made “legitimate” demands in its latest formal response to the United States’ peace proposal, after US President Donald Trump rejected the reply as “totally unacceptable”.
Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei said Tehran had called for an end to the war across the region, the lifting of the US blockade of Iranian ports, and the release of frozen assets abroad in its response.
“We did not demand any concessions. The only thing we demanded was Iran’s legi...

findings.title: Trump to Axios: "I don't like" Iran's peace plan response
findings.summary: President Trump told Axios in a short phone call on Sunday that he would reject Iran's response to the latest draft agreement to end the war. Why it matters: The U.S. waited 10 days for the Iranian response, which came on Sunday. The White House hoped Iran's positions would show further progress toward a deal, but Trump's initial reaction signals the opposite.What he's saying: "I don't like their letter. It's inappropriate. I don't like their response," Trump said, declining to go into furthe...

findings.title: EN DIRECT - Guerre au Moyen-Orient: les États-Unis continuent d’avoir des «exigences déraisonnables» selon l'Iran
findings.summary: Donald Trump ⁠a qualifié dimanche ​soir de « totalement inacceptable » la réponse iranienne à la proposition de Washington destinée à mettre fin à leur ​conflit, tandis que Téhéran a dénoncé des « demandes excessives » qui équivaudraient à une capitulation, a rapporté la presse officielle iranienne. Peu après, Benyamin Netanyahu a fait part de sa détermination à récupérer l'uranium iranien dans une interview à la télévision CBS.
findings.text: EN DIRECT - Guerre au Moyen-Orient: les États-Unis continuent d’avoir des «exigences déraisonnables» selon l'Iran | Donald Trump ⁠a qualifié dimanche ​soir de « totalement inacceptable » la réponse iranienne à la proposition de Washington destinée à mettre fin à leur ​conflit, tandis que Téhéran a dénoncé des « demandes excessives » qui équivaudraient à une capitulation, a rapporté la presse officielle iranienne. Peu après, Benyamin Netanyahu a fait part de sa détermination à récupérer l'uranium iranien dans une interview à la télévision CBS.
